title: onobrychis peduncularis subsp. jahandiezii
intro: Onobrychis peduncularis subsp. jahandiezii, a plant species in the legume family, is a type of wild sainfoin or scorpion clover, known for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Onobrychis peduncularis subsp. jahandiezii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
